data.title: Register debug.intent_search_budget config key
data.description:
Add debug.intent_search_budget=20 to .claude/dso-config.conf. This registers the configurable budget for the intent search sub-agent (Gate 1a). Default value is 20 tool calls.

Also add a corresponding entry to plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md following the existing pattern for debug.max_fix_validate_cycles.

test-exempt: Unit exemption criterion 3 — static config file (KEY=VALUE line). Config key behavioral verification is handled by Task 3's test suite (test_gate_1a_config_key_default calls read-config.sh via subprocess).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Config key exists in dso-config.conf
  Verify: grep -q 'debug.intent_search_budget=20' .claude/dso-config.conf
- [ ] read-config.sh returns the default value
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/read-config.sh debug.intent_search_budget | grep -q '20'
- [ ] CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md documents the new key
  Verify: grep -q 'intent_search_budget' plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md
